descriptors: reuses graphics from Donkey Kong Jr. arcade
primitive logo design in Japanese version
more detailed and colorful international title screen
distinctive_elements: chain elements instead of vines in gameplay
arithmetic symbols and digits as collectibles
Pink Donkey Kong Jr. character variant

sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Donkey Kong Jr. Math
note: T3 tier data: Documentation available focuses on narrative/gameplay rather than visual specifications. Sprite dimensions, animation frame counts, and color palette details are not documented in provided sources. Game heavily reuses CHR ROM from original Donkey Kong Jr. arcade game.
